seo.title: Dr. Mathot
seo.description: Your specialist in General Dermatology and Nail Disorders.

home.name: Dr. Olivia Mathot
home.description-line1: Medical, aesthetic, and pediatric dermatology, with a personalized approach and a special focus on nail disorders.
home.description-line2: Care based on thorough evaluation, clear communication, and the latest medical insights.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Dr. Mathot completed
about.description: her medical studies at the Université Libre de Bruxelles (ULB), where she earned her Medical Degree in 2020. She subsequently specialized in Dermatology and Venereology, obtaining her specialist certification in 2025, both with great distinction.

contact.urgentItem1: During opening hours: please contact the reception

clinic2.label: Dermatology Research Institute – Uccle

contact.medicalDisclaimerParagraph1: In accordance with the Code of Medical Ethics and GDPR regulations regarding the protection of health data, no medical advice is provided via e‑mail.
contact.medicalDisclaimerParagraph2: A reliable diagnosis requires a clinical examination and a comprehensive consultation. In addition, e‑mail is not a secure means of communication for medical data and does not comply with the legal framework for teleconsultations.
contact.medicalDisclaimerParagraph3: Prescriptions and medical certificates are issued during the consultation.
contact.medicalDisclaimerParagraph4: Patients already under follow-up may, if necessary, use the contact details provided during their consultation.
